originalTitle: Massa Massa Video Song | Peddi | Ram Charan | Buchi Babu | Janhvi | AR Rahman | Vishal Mishra
content: Presenting the Official Video of "Massa Massa" from the film "PEDDI". Releasing in cinemas worldwide on 4th June. #GetReadyForPeddi 💥💥 ------------------------------------------ Connect with T-Series Telugu: 👉 http://bit.ly/SubscribeToTseriesTelugu ------------------------------------------ 🎶 Music Slate 🎶 Music: A R Rahman Lyrics: Anantha Sri Ram Singer: Vishal Mishra Additional Vocals: Rakshita Suresh, Deepthi Suresh Music Supervisor: Prashanth Venkat Project Manager: Karthik Sekaran Strings: Budapest Scoring Orchestra Recording Studio - Rottenbiller Hall Conductor: Zoltan Pad Orchestra Indian Representative - Balasubramanian G Session Producer - Bálint Sapszon Engineered by Viktor Szabó / Denes Radly Librarian- Anna Sapszo, Kati Ret Choral Arrangement: Arjun Chandy Additional Programmers: Prashanth Venkat, Santhosh Dhayanidhi, Suryansh, P R Raghav Vocal Producers: Sarath Santosh, Suryansh Sound engineers: Panchathan Record Inn, Chennai Senior Engineers : Suresh Permal, Karthik Sekaran, Assistant Engineers : Sathish V Saravanan, Bharath Arjunan Song Mixed and Mastered by Nitish R Kumar Dolby Music Mix and Technical Lead Riyasdeen Riyan Musicians Co Ordinators: Samidurai R, Abdul Haiyum Lyrical Video by: PERAVALI PAVAN KALYAN Cast: Mega Power Star Ram Charan, Janhvi Kapoor, Shiva Rajkumar, Jagapathi Babu, Divyendu Sharma, Shruthi Haasan Music: A R Rahman Written & Directed by: Buchi Babu Sana Technical Crew: Presents: Mythri Movie Makers, Sukumar Writings Banner: Vriddhi Cinemas Producer: Venkata Satish Kilaru Co-Producer: Ishan Saksena Choreographer: Bosco Martis DOP: Ratnavelu ISC Editor: Navin Nooli Production Design: Avinash Kolla Executive Producer: V. Y. chineseSummary: T 系列泰卢固语 · 773,440 次观看
chineseContent: 展示电影“PEDDI”中“Massa Massa”的官方视频。 6月4日在全球影院上映。 #GetReadyForPeddi 💥💥 ---------------------------------------- 与 T 系列泰卢固语连接：👉 http://bit.ly/SubscribeToTseriesTelugu ------------------------------------------ 🎶 Music Slate 🎶 音乐：A R Rahman 歌词：Anantha Sri Ram 歌手：Vishal Mishra 附加演唱：Rakshita Suresh、Deepthi Suresh 音乐总监：Prashanth Venkat 项目经理：Karthik Sekaran 弦乐：布达佩斯评分乐团录音室 - Rottenbiller Hall 指挥：Zoltan Pad Orchestra 印度代表 - Balasubramanian G Session 制作人 - Bálint Sapszon 设计者：Viktor Szabó / Denes Radly 图书管理员 - Anna Sapszo、Kati Ret 合唱编曲：Arjun Chandy 其他程序员：Prashanth Venkat、Santhosh Dhayanidhi、Suryansh、PR Raghav 声乐制作人：Sarath Santosh、Suryansh 音响工程师：Panchathan Record Inn、Chennai 高级工程师：Suresh Permal、Karthik Sekaran，助理工程师：Sathish V Saravanan、Bharath Arjunan 歌曲由 Nitish R Kumar 混合和掌握 杜比音乐混音和技术主管 Riyasdeen Riyan 音乐家联合协调员：Samidurai R、 Abdul Haiyum 抒情视频：PERAVALI PAVAN KALYAN 演员：超级明星 Ram Charan、Janhvi Kapoor、Shiva Rajkumar、Jagapathi Babu、Divyendu Sharma、Shruthi Haasan 音乐：A R Rahman 编剧和导演：Buchi Babu Sana 技术人员：呈现：Mythri Movie Makers、Sukumarwriting 横幅：Vriddhi Cinemas 制片人： Venkata Satish Kilaru 联合制片人：Ishan Saksena 编舞：Bosco Martis DOP：Ratnavelu ISC 编辑：Navin Nooli 制作设计：Avinash Kolla 执行制片人：V. Y. Praveen Kumar 视觉特效总监：Sanath PC 声音设计：Raghunath Kemisetty 营销：First Show PRO：Vams
